title: (Bullish Signal) FNGO, Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend on January 25, 2021.
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
Over the last three days, Tickeron's A.I.dvisor has detected that FNGO's AroonUp green line (see chart) is above 70, while the AroonDown red line is below 30. When the green line goes above 70 while the red line stays below 30, this is an indicator that the stock could be poised for a strong Uptrend. For traders, this could mean going long the stock or exploring call options in the next month. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor backtested this indicator and found 217 similar cases, 203 of which were successful. Based on this data, the odds of success are 90%. Current price $214.72 is above $160.92 the highest resistance line found by Tickeron A.I. Throughout the month of 12/21/20 - 01/25/21, the price experienced a +17% Uptrend. During the week of 01/15/21 - 01/25/21, the ETF enjoyed a +17% Uptrend growth.

https://preview.redd.it/ztmnds70ypd61.png?width=1526&format=png&auto=webp&s=f1881a3ff1ccce16f4e99bc083ac5ac2e38eeb8c

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on January 19, 2021. You may want to consider a long position or call options on FNGO as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 34 of 42 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 81%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) for FNGO just turned positive on January 20, 2021. Looking at past instances where FNGO's MACD turned positive, the stock continued to rise, Tickeron A.I. shows that in 24 of 27 cases over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 89%.

Following a +1.69% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where FNGO advanced for three days, in 172 of 187 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 90%.

The Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend today. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 203 of 217 cases where FNGO Aroon's Indicator entered an Uptrend, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued Uptrend are 90%.

[Full information about signal here](https://tickeron.com/news/8935628-microsectors-fang-2x-leveraged-etn-s-fngo-212-22-aroon-indicator-entered-an-uptrend-on-january-25-2021?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=article&utm_term=signal)
